name: Tamale Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions and garlic in olive oil until fragrant.
2. Remove from pan and set aside.
3. Add ground meat to the skillet; brown without breaking it up too much.
4. Discard excess fat and liquid.
5. Return onions and garlic to the skillet.
6. Stir in remaining ingredients, mixing well.
7. Transfer mixture to a casserole dish.
8. Sprinkle grated cheddar cheese on top.
9. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees for 1 hour. Serve warm.
